si.t: How long the driver waits in the parking lot before being called.
Time from SMS to arriving at scale (loading) or unloading bay (unloading).
Administrative wrap-up: documents, SAP posting, session closure.
End-to-end session duration from truck arrival to session closure.
Loading sessions use weighing timestamps for Driver Response and Operation (weighing is mandatory).
Unloading sessions use Task state transitions (RUNNING / FINISHED) because weighing is optional (kontrolno only).
Empty duration cells mean one or both timestamps were missing for that session.
Edit Green Max / Orange Max values above (in minutes), then re-run ExtractKPIs.
Durations are displayed as h:mm. Timestamps are shown as DD-MMM HH:MM.
Sessions with Status 'open' or 'unlinked' are included but only partial KPIs are calculated. Closeout, Total, and Closing Time require a closed session.
If no SMS was sent, Parking Wait uses 1st Weighing (loading) or Task Running (unloading) minus Session Created. Driver Response shows 'no SMS'.
